publicMetadata.name: Center Gravity
publicMetadata.description: A center-control seed that demonstrates lane priority and pressure from central space.

publicMetadata.name: Ghost Orbit
publicMetadata.description: An evasive mobility seed that teaches controlled movement instead of pure flight.

publicMetadata.name: Last Light
publicMetadata.description: A late-cycle stabilization seed that values credible endings over early-only pressure.

publicMetadata.name: Mirror Key
publicMetadata.description: An adaptive seed for breaking symmetric or repeated matchup patterns.

publicMetadata.name: Rear Guard Sentinel
publicMetadata.description: An Advanced seed focused on denying clean rear arcs and forcing Backstab hunters into visible lanes.

publicMetadata.name: Recall Hunter
publicMetadata.description: A memory-first response seed that uses remembered chase lanes to pressure opponents over repeated Cycles.

publicMetadata.name: Ring Shelter
publicMetadata.description: A contraction-survival seed that treats late-cycle stabilization as a first-class doctrine.

publicMetadata.name: Snare Weaver
publicMetadata.description: A trap/control seed that baits direct pressure and turns contact timing into board control.

publicMetadata.name: Stonewall Shear
publicMetadata.description: A wall-control Advanced seed that pressures lanes near board edges without confusing edge play for pure camping.

publicMetadata.name: Vanguard Pressure
publicMetadata.description: A contact-first Advanced seed that applies early pressure while preserving replayable evidence against passive doctrines.

publicMetadata.name: Aggro Chaser
publicMetadata.description: Pursues the closest active enemy and forces contact quickly.

publicMetadata.name: Backstab Hunter
publicMetadata.description: Tracks rear-facing opportunities and remembers the most promising chase lane.

publicMetadata.name: Center Turtle
publicMetadata.description: Holds a stable central posture, avoids unnecessary adjacency, and stones when boxed.

publicMetadata.name: Centerline Bully
publicMetadata.description: Claims central lanes early, faces pressure, and tries to keep enemies moving toward shrinking danger.

publicMetadata.name: Corner Lurker
publicMetadata.description: Defends near safer corners and punishes reckless contact with STONE.

publicMetadata.name: Escape Artist
publicMetadata.description: Optimizes legal exits from threat zones and remembers bad lanes.

publicMetadata.name: Mirror Breaker
publicMetadata.description: Mirrors enemy pressure early, then breaks symmetry once the board tightens.

publicMetadata.name: Ring Runner
publicMetadata.description: Orbits the shrinking ring and remembers its turn direction between decisions.

publicMetadata.name: Trap Setter
publicMetadata.description: Baits pursuit along a remembered lane and turns to STONE when contact arrives.

publicMetadata.name: Wall Press
publicMetadata.description: Uses the edge of the board as a pressure tool and advances when enemies are near constrained lanes.
